description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant blue and cream-colored label featuring illustrations of sailboats on the ocean and cartoon characters along the lower portion. The upper half of the can is dominated by a deep blue background with white and yellow sailboats, waves, and stylized clouds, evoking a maritime theme. The lower section displays a series of playful cartoon figures in various poses, bordered by Japanese text. The can's top is metallic and features a standard pull tab opening, which appears to be open. The label includes both English and Japanese writing, with a prominent logo in bold white letters. The can shows some signs of wear and fading, particularly on the lower half, suggesting it has been handled or exposed to the elements.
description: A blue and cream aluminum beer can with sailboat graphics, cartoon characters, and both English and Japanese text. The can features a pull tab opening and a worn, maritime-themed label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main sailboat graphics, bold white logo, and several cartoon characters with Japanese text below.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the volume marking (350ml), recycling symbol, and more faded label details with additional cartoon figures.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the continuation of the sailboat scene and cartoon characters, with less prominent text.
description_view_3: Alternate front view with the large white logo, prominent sailboats, and a clear view of the pull tab opening.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold blue and cream color scheme with dynamic sailboat illustrations, stylized ocean waves, and playful cartoon characters. Typography is a mix of bold white English letters and Japanese text, creating a lively and whimsical maritime theme.
